visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey wool coat, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She is holding a large green and clear plastic bag of Japanese Butter Potatoes. Her facial expression is excited as she points at the bag and gestures toward the refrigerated display case behind her, which is filled with rows of the same product. The background shows blurred shoppers and Costco signage like 'CAKES'. (2) The camera zooms in on a white price tag displaying '555249 JAPAN BUTTER POTATO $349'. The woman's hand points specifically at the product details. Then, a quick cut shows multiple blue boxes lined up on a metal refrigerated shelf, each containing several bags of the potatoes. The lighting is sterile and bright from overhead fluorescent lamps. (3) The woman is seen again, now speaking animatedly with varied hand gestures, still holding the potato bag. She turns slightly to show the scale of the display. Large yellow and white subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The scene is full of visual movement as she adjusts the bag and talks directly into the camera. (4) The setting shifts to a cozy indoor living room with warm lighting. Two women sit at a white table. The woman from before is on the left, and another woman wearing a dark blue beret and white sweater is on the right. They are holding the same potato package, discussing it. They use forks to pick up small pieces of cooked potato from a blue bowl on the table. (5) A close-up shot shows a fork holding a bite-sized piece of yellowish potato. One woman is seen tasting it and reacting with a thoughtful expression. They continue to talk, gesturing with their hands toward the food and each other. In the background, a simple white wall and a hint of a kitchen area are visible.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 終於出現了. [Variety]: 你看一整排. (2) [Subtitle]: 真的很誇張耶. [Variety]: 終於出現. (3) [Subtitle]: 他是整個櫃都給他哎. (4) [Subtitle]: 非常瘋狂. (5) [Subtitle]: 有點誇張. (6) [Subtitle]: 我們那時候還請比爾打電話去問. (7) [Subtitle]: 找不到. (8) [Subtitle]: 終於出現了. (9) [Subtitle]: 好開心啊. (10) [Subtitle]: 日本北海道奶油馬鈴薯. (11) [Subtitle]: 1.1公斤有三入 349元. (12) [Subtitle]: 我們回去吃看看. (13) [Subtitle]: 聽說是男爵馬鈴薯. (14) [Subtitle]: 微波後隔水加熱就可以吃. (15) [Subtitle]: 聽起來很紳士. (16) [Subtitle]: 男爵馬鈴薯哇喔. (17) [Subtitle]: 349元 日本北海道奶油馬鈴薯. (18) [Subtitle]: 裡面總共有12顆. (19) [Subtitle]: 所以每一顆馬鈴薯是29塊錢. (20) [Subtitle]: 網友都大喊終於回來了. (21) [Subtitle]: 那麼人氣的商品究竟好不好吃. (22) [Subtitle]: 我們現在來微波加熱看看. (23) [Subtitle]: 微波加熱後兩分鐘就可以食用. (24) [Subtitle]: 那看到這支影片的人有福啦. (25) [Subtitle]: 因為我們一致認為. (26) [Variety]: 它的調味有一點淡. (27) [Subtitle]: 建議大家可以改買. (28) [Subtitle]: 另外一個好市多很便宜的商品. (29) [Subtitle]: 叫做澳洲白玉馬鈴薯. (30) [Subtitle]: 只要簡單的水煮加鹽. (31) [Subtitle]: 就會非常的好吃. (32) [Subtitle]: 而且味道我覺得更綿密. (33) [Subtitle]: 它的好處就是它是微波即食食品.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators, several shoppers in the background at Costco.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair in a grey coat; another woman with a blue beret and white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse with refrigerated shelves and price tags, followed by an indoor dining area with a white table and plain walls.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal female voice begins with rapid-fire delivery and a high-pitched, excited tone. Background music is a high-tempo, major-mode electronic track with a steady beat at approximately 120 BPM. A subtle 'ding' sound effect occurs as she highlights the product's return. Minimal ambient supermarket floor noise is heard. (2) A distinct 'rustle' of plastic packaging triggers this phase. The vocal intensity remains high as the speaker describes the quantity and price. The BGM continues with a bright, synth-heavy texture. No significant pauses occur in the speech, maintaining a fast-paced conversational flow with clear articulation. (3) A 'click' sound from the camera transition marks a new phase. The narration shifts to a duo format with two female voices interacting. The pitch variability is high as they emphasize words like '紳士' and '男爵'. The BGM swells slightly in volume during transitions between spoken sentences. (4) A 'ding' SFX marks the mention of the flavor review. The female voices discuss the seasoning, noting it is slightly light. The acoustic environment is now a quiet indoor space with very low room tone. The music maintains its energetic, comedic vibe, perfectly synced with the fast-paced vocal delivery. (5) A metallic 'clink' of a fork against a plate initiates the final phase. The speakers provide a comparative recommendation for Australian potatoes. The vocal tone is friendly and informative. The BGM fades out slightly as the video concludes, ending on a high-energy vocal note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Finding product -> Review/Comparison -> Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share the discovery of a popular potato product at Costco, demonstrate how to prepare it, and provide an honest taste review and comparison with other varieties to help viewers make informed purchasing decisions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video presents a personal experience and recommendation without explicit promotional language or sponsorship disclosure.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Fast-paced social media style food review with high energy, frequent subtitles, and comedic editing elements.
